about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Data Science and AI builder with a product-first systems mindset.
about.body: I am pursuing an M.Sc. in Data Science and AI at Eindhoven University of Technology (TU/e). Across internships and independent products, I have worked on AI/ML-driven systems, full-stack applications, and analytics workflows that improve real decision-making.

items.title: Readable intelligence

projects.title: Selected projects
projects.description: A curated mix of AI, analytics, and product engineering work across healthcare, fintech, and autonomous decision systems.

items.title: UMA
items.summary: A privacy-first medical record workspace that converts fragmented documents into structured patient timelines with clear retrieval.

storyline.label: trigger
storyline.body: Specialists send PDFs. Hospitals send scans. Patients juggle ten apps. A timeline is impossible.

storyline.label: move
storyline.body: Local-first ingestion + on-device parsing. No record leaves the patient's device unless they say so.

storyline.label: result
storyline.body: A single, scrubbable timeline of symptoms, labs, prescriptions, and appointments — searchable in plain language.

items.title: TabScape
items.summary: A personal finance product focused on forecasting, recurring expense logic, and budgeting behavior over time.

storyline.label: trigger
storyline.body: Most budgeting apps tell you what already happened. None show you what's coming.

storyline.label: move
storyline.body: Recurring-expense detection + Bayesian forecast bands per category, replanned daily.

storyline.label: result
storyline.body: A 30-day cashflow horizon that updates as you spend — visible at a glance.

items.title: RoboTrader
items.summary: A signal-driven trading platform with live dashboards, strategy backtesting, and autonomous execution controls.

storyline.label: trigger
storyline.body: Backtests look great. Live trading destroys them. The gap is execution discipline.

storyline.label: move
storyline.body: Strategy DSL + paper-trading replay + live websocket feed — all using one execution engine.

storyline.label: result
storyline.body: Backtest behavior matches live within 0.2% slippage. The dashboard shows both at once.

items.title: Viveka
items.summary: Long-form publication on AI, philosophy, and decision-making — built as an editorial reading surface.

storyline.label: trigger
storyline.body: AI essays read like blog posts. They deserve magazine-grade type and pacing.

storyline.label: move
storyline.body: MDX-driven editorial layouts: pull quotes, drop caps, footnotes, full-bleed plates.

storyline.label: result
storyline.body: An archive that reads like a quarterly, updated continuously.

items.title: Diagnostic Reasoning
items.summary: A reasoning system that walks through differential diagnoses and explains its choices step-by-step.

storyline.label: trigger
storyline.body: Black-box diagnostic models get rejected by clinicians, even when they're right.

storyline.label: move
storyline.body: Force the model to externalize each branching decision; render it as a navigable tree.

storyline.label: result
storyline.body: Clinicians can audit and override. Trust comes from being able to disagree.

items.title: Calm Ops
items.summary: Observability dashboard designed around calm UX — surface what matters, hide what doesn't.

storyline.label: trigger
storyline.body: The average ops dashboard alerts you 200 times a day. 198 of them don't matter.

storyline.label: move
storyline.body: Single-screen status with a quiet/loud axis. Only escalate visually when correlated.

storyline.label: result
storyline.body: MTTR -38%, alert fatigue scores cut in half.

snapshots.title: Systems-first mindset
